name: 4everBods Fitness
description: The Duanesburg YMCA closed during the COVID pandemic and was sold to County then 4everBods Fitness.  Four courts indoor wood floor marked gym floor portable nets used outdoor 2 courts asphalt. Requires membership or day pass fee for Seniors they accept Silver Sneakers. Call for pickleball play times.

name: Avon Crest Town Park
description: Come play pickleball at Avon Crest Town Park in Niskayuna, NY! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Collins Park
description: Collins Park is a place to play pickleball in Schenectady, NY. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Glenville Senior Citizens Center
description: Come play pickleball at Glenville Senior Citizens Center in Schenectady, NY! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.
hours: Mon. - Fri., 9AM - 5PM; June - August, 9AM - 4PM. See department for specific times. Government Websites by CivicPlus ® Login

name: Hillhurst Park
description: Hillhurst Park is a place to play pickleball in Schenectady, NY. There are 6 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Indian Meadows Park
description: Town park 6 new outdoor Pickleball courts opened fall 2024
hours: Mon. - Fri., 9AM - 5PM; June - August, 9AM - 4PM. See department for specific times. Government Websites by CivicPlus ® Login

name: Jewish Community Center - Schenectady
description: Jewish Community Center - Schenectady is a place to play pickleball in Schenectady, NY. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: JMJC Pickleball
description: JMJC Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Glenville, NY. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Rotterdam Senior Center
description: Rotterdam Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Schenectady, NY. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Schenectady YMCA
description: Three indoor courts marked wooden floor use portable nets. Can call for pickleball play times or go to web CDYMCA (Capital District YMCA) to look for time schedule for this location.
fees: Members only — Membership or Seniors Silver Sneakers

name: SPORTIME Schenectady
description: Come play pickleball at SPORTIME Schenectady in Schenectady, NY! There are 5 indoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available.
hours: court walk-on court-time privileges for juniors Access to adult and junior tennis and pickleball clinics/programs and seasonal access to outdoor, har-tru, soft-surface courts Unlimited access to state-of-the-art fitness facility on two levels Get on the list Please opt-in and stay in the know about club alerts, specials and more.
